boundary: Goal1084 prepares a corrected facility RTX pod run only. It does not create cloud resources, does not run cloud locally, does not authorize release, does not change public wording, and does not authorize public RTX speedup claims.

Treat this as evidence collection only; no public wording changes are authorized by this runner.
